summary: Tested LinguaConnect iteration: notification counts/badges (Chats/Moments/Me tabs), follow/visit notification creation, push relay graceful failure, recent visitors card, voice room stage padding, and new Admin Console Integrations tab. Backend: 14/14 pytest cases passed. Frontend: all core flows verified via Playwright on mobile viewport (375x667) and admin console on desktop viewport - all working as specified with no regressions found.
action_items: None blocking - all requested features verified working correctly.
Minor note: root data-testid for bottom tab bar buttons is `tab-chats`, `tab-connect`, `tab-moments`, `tab-voice`, `tab-profile` (not `tab-me`) - useful reference for future test scripts.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/notifications.py, routes/push.py, routes/users.py, routes/admin.py are clean, properly async, use env vars, exclude Mongo _id via explicit field mapping, and handle push failures with try/except so primary actions (follow/visit) always succeed.

push-native.ts correctly guards expo-notifications behind pushSupported check (Platform.OS !== 'web' && !IS_EXPO_GO) preventing the previously-reported Android Expo Go bundle crash - confirmed no crash occurs currently in expo logs during this test run (web bundling clean); an older crash trace exists earlier in expo.out.log from before this session's fix, not reproduced now.
notifications_col import bug in routes/users.py mentioned in context notes is confirmed FIXED - import present at top of file (db.py), follow/visit endpoints work correctly without NameError.
seed_data_creation: Created test 'like' notification (diego liked mei's moment) and test 'follow' notification (diego followed mei) via direct API calls to validate badge/notification flows; also briefly uploaded/removed a dummy google-services.json during admin test, then restored a placeholder google-services.json file to preserve prior 'configured' state for main agent's continued testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bottom tab bar buttons use tabBarButtonTestID: tab-chats, tab-connect, tab-moments, tab-voice, tab-profile (NOT tab-me). Login screen uses testIDs auth-email-input/auth-password-input/auth-submit-btn (not login-*). Moments bell uses testID notifications-bell-btn / badge notifications-badge. Verified flows: (1) GET /api/notifications/counts correctly scoped by type, (2) GET /api/notifications only returns like/comment/reply, unread matches moments_unread, (3) POST /api/notifications/read?category=... scopes correctly, (4) follow creates notification only on follow not unfollow + push failure doesn't block action, (5) visit creates notification only on first visit + push failure gracefully handled, (6) Chats/Moments tab numeric badges and Me tab red dot all work and clear correctly on visiting respective screens, (7) Profile 'Recent visitors' 3-avatar stack shown correctly for VIP user with visitors, (8) voice room stage has visible padding below header/hand-raise bar - no clipping of avatars/badges observed, (9) Admin Integrations tab shows file status, upload/replace/remove all functional and reflected in GET; other admin tabs (Overview/Users/Market/Moments/Settings) work with no regression.
